# Cross-Border B2B Payments — India + SE Asia

Cross-border remittance + SMB banking for India, Indonesia, Philippines.
Integrates local rails: UPI (India), GCash (PH), OVO/DANA (Indonesia).
RBI tokenization for cards-on-file. DPDP Act 2023 + Decree 53 (Vietnam) data residency.
OFAC / EU / UN sanctions screening, daily refresh.
